UpdPerL2BktLnkInfo.action: Fixed value UpdatePeriodL2BucketLinkInfo for this API
UpdPerL2BktLnkInfo.instanceId: PFS instance ID to which the data flow belongs
UpdPerL2BktLnkInfo.bucketLinkId: ID of the data flow to be updated
UpdPerL2BktLnkInfo.newBucketLinkName: New name for the bucket link
UpdPerL2BktLnkInfo.newScope: New visibility scope; this setting only takes effect for data flow tasks created after 2026-01-01
